case_title: COQUILLA, DONNA VS BREITMAN, BRUCE DBA THE BREITMAN COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-12-1993, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BREITMAN, BRUCE DBA THE BREITMAN COMPANY PERIOD OF LIMITATIONS HAS EXPIRED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COQUILLA, DONNA AS TO DEFENDANT BREITMAN, BRUCE DBA THE BREITMAN COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-24-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-03-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RECONSIDERATION CONTINUED FROM APR-08-1994 TO MAY-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COQUILLA, DONNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BREITMAN, BRUCE DBA THE BREITMAN COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-12-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO BRUCE BREITMAN, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RECONSIDERATION OF MAY-11-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-30-1992, OFF CALENDAR
MOTION RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF COQUILLA, DONNA HEARING SET FOR APR-08-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BREITMAN, BRUCE DBA THE BREITMAN COMPANY
